notes: Master-Reorg R-3b — PLATFORMS correction (redesign-only, legacy byte-identical). Replaces the .173 landing John rejected on device (flat inline-styled tiles failed the design bar). THREE changes: (1) LANDING REBUILT in the app's card language — the five platform cards + SHARED now render as .rf-card components inheriting the exact Crash-Cart square treatment (photoreal icon, accent glow, press/focus) via the shared .deploy-tools-grid hook + .rf-grid-wrap responsive grid; six John-approved photoreal WebP icons added (icons/phantom-plat-{h100,h200,b200,gb200,gb300,shared}-256.webp, precached in sw.js). (2) GB-NVL FOLD REVERTED to FIVE platform cards per the logged decision — H100 · H200 · B200 · GB200 · GB300 (the .173 'GB200 folded into GB-NVL, John's call' comment was a mis-log; corrected). (3) PER-PLATFORM DRILL-IN — a platform tap (rd_platformOpen) now shows a filtered panel of the matching reference cards instead of dumping every tap at pw-power top: rd_platformMatches scans the re-homed Power/LED-GPU/Thermal panels and title/badge-regex-matches the platform (\b before B200 excludes the B200 inside GB200), CLONES matches into a detail overlay (source content stays mounted + unmutated — Design Law 3; [data-pdu] diagrams re-id'd per-clone so pdu_render targets the clone; other ids stripped to avoid collisions), honest empty-state ('No {name}-specific reference yet — see SHARED', never a blank/silent fallback), BACK returns to the landing. SHARED keeps the current behavior (scroll to the shared PDU & Power Math content). DEVIATIONS from spec (reported): (a) B200 art — no on-spec textless/air B200 was delivered; the two 'B200'-labeled candidates carried baked-in text + DLC hoses (factually wrong for air-cooled B200), so B200 maps to the clean textless reactor board; (b) cooling shown as plain '·'-separated meta ('Hopper · AIR') + accent color (cyan air / violet DLC) rather than a bordered chip — matches the .155 Crash-Cart meta style John approved on-device (a bordered chip clutters the square-card scrim); (c) SHARED icon is white-keyed (not black full-bleed) since the delivered SHARED art was white-bg — but its own metal frame makes all six read as consistent rugged panels. One new body.rd-scoped CSS block (drill-in show/hide + detail header/empty-state); no legacy markup, showPage, or shared-router touch → ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Gates: 4 script blocks compile, CSS braces balanced, CRLF preserved. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first): Crash Cart → PLATFORMS → SIX rf-cards (H100/H200/B200/GB200/GB300/SHARED) with the new photoreal icons, same look/glow as the Crash-Cart grid (no flat tiles); AIR-accent on H100/H200/B200, DLC-accent on GB200/GB300; tap H100 → only Hopper-relevant rows + BACK; tap GB300 → GB300/NVL rows; tap SHARED → PDU/derate/DLC content; B200 → honest empty-state; old pill strip below unchanged; ?legacy=1 identical. ROLLBACK: revert the commit + delete the 6 icons.
